message:
feat(install): implement ECDSA P-256 signature verification (process_triage-ica.1.1)

Add cryptographic signature verification for release binaries using
ECDSA with NIST P-256 curve. Supports:
- SEC1, base64, and PEM public key formats
- DER-encoded detached .sig sidecar signatures
- Multiple public keys for key rotation
- File-level verification (binary + .sig pair)
- Key fingerprinting (SHA-256)
- Signing helper for CI tooling and tests

33 unit tests covering: key parsing, signature parsing, verification
(valid/invalid/tampered), key rotation, file operations, edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
